AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with descriptive framing ('Per the user's report', 'single observed pattern rather than a measured trend'), but no explicit invocation of the observation-vs-decision distinction as routing rationale.

AR3.justification: No cross-references in the artifact; missing the daybook Log pointer to the observation that a methodology-shaped routing would carry.

AR4.justification: Section header lacks an ISO-dated prefix; a re-run would clobber the existing entry rather than append a new dated section.
